characters.appearance: Young woman, early 20s, slim build, fair complexion, long brown hair styled in a side braid.
characters.wardrobe: In the airport, a rust-colored cardigan over a white ribbed top with a patterned scarf and dark jeans. In the split-screen, a grey blazer over a white top.
characters.demeanor: Initially hesitant and nervous, later enthusiastic and engaged.

characters.appearance: Older man, 50s, average build, fair complexion, salt-and-pepper hair.
characters.wardrobe: Navy blue quarter-zip pullover and khaki pants.

characters.appearance: Young woman, fair complexion, red hair pulled back.
characters.demeanor: Cheerful, encouraging, with a static but expressive face.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: I am flying to Dubai. Mere paas ek luggage hai... I mean, one suitcase... [I am flying to Dubai. I have one luggage... I mean, one suitcase...]
Character B says: Pehli baar akele travel kar rahi ho? English bolne mein tension ho rahi hai? [First time traveling alone? Feeling tense about speaking English?]
Character A says: Bohot obvious hai kya? Samajh sab aata hai, bas bolte waqt atak jaati hoon. [Is it that obvious? I understand everything, I just get stuck while speaking.]
Character B says: Meri beti ka bhi yahi haal tha. Ab wo Supernova app par practice karti hai. Usme AI tutor se baat kar sakte ho. Jaise check-in counter par aane se pehle hi poori practice kar lo. [My daughter was the same. Now she practices on the Supernova app. You can talk to an AI tutor there. Like practicing the whole check-in before you even reach the counter.]
Character A says: AI ke saath English practice? [English practice with an AI?]
Character B says: Din mein bas 10 minute. Pichle mahine usne khud confidence se hotel booking ki thi. [Just 10 minutes a day. Last month she confidently booked a hotel herself.]
Character A says: Acha, dikhaiye. Waise bhi line mein pandrah log hain mere aage. [Okay, show me. There are fifteen people ahead of me in line anyway.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: knowing English but freezing while speaking in real-world situations.
- Introduces Supernova as a practical, AI-based solution for practicing specific scenarios like airport check-ins.
- Uses a relatable, encouraging older character to validate the app's effectiveness.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
I am flying to Dubai.
Mere paas ek luggage hai...
I mean, one suitcase...
Pehli baar akele travel kar rahi ho?
Bohot obvious hai kya?
Samajh sab aata hai, bas bolte waqt atak jaati hoon.
Meri beti ka bhi yahi haal tha.
Ab wo Supernova app par practice karti hai.
Jaise check-in counter par aane se pehle hi poori practice kar lo.
AI ke saath English practice?
Din mein bas 10 minute. Pichle mahine usne khud confidence se hotel booking ki thi.
Acha, dikhaiye. Waise bhi line mein pandrah log hain mere aage.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: What are you doing today? [What are you doing today?]
Character A says: I am working. Aaj mujhe many work hai. [I am working. Today I have many work.]
Character C says: Do you mean: "I have a lot of work today"? [Do you mean: "I have a lot of work today"?]
Character A says: Yes, I have a lot of work today and mera dimaag not working. [Yes, I have a lot of work today and my brain not working.]
Character C says: Do you mean: "my brain isn't working"? [Do you mean: "my brain isn't working"?]
Character A says: Yes, I have a lot of work and my brain isn't working! [Yes, I have a lot of work and my brain isn't working!]
Character C says: That's perfect! Bahot badhiya, Priya! [That's perfect! Very good, Priya!]
Character A says: Mujhe roz English bolni hai, but classes bohot expensive hoti hain! [I want to speak English everyday, but classes are very expensive!]
Character C says: Why don't you practice with an AI tutor? [Why don't you practice with an AI tutor?]
Character A says: AI tutor? Mujhe koi aisa chahiye jo meri mistakes correct kare, bina judge kiye. [AI tutor? I want someone who can correct my mistakes, without judging me.]
Character C says: Jaise maine kiya! I am your Supernova AI tutor. Nice to meet you, Priya! [Like I did! I am your Supernova AI tutor. Nice to meet you, Priya!]
Character A says: Tum AI tutor ho? Sach mein? Ye toh amazing hai! [You're an AI tutor? Really? This is amazing!]
Character C says: Supernova app download karo aur roz mere saath practice karo. I'll help you speak fluently! [Download the Supernova app and practice with me daily. I'll help you speak fluently!]
Character A says: Done! Main aaj se hi apni daily practice shuru karungi. [Done! I will start my daily practice from today itself.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core app feature: real-time grammar correction by an AI tutor in a conversational setting.
- Highlights the affordability and non-judgmental nature of the AI compared to expensive human classes.
- Ends with a strong call-to-action to download Supernova for daily practice.
